item.title: [Dropout Improv] Dropout Improv Summer 2025 Tour Trailer
item.description:
Dropout Improv is going back on tour this June with shows across the Midwest & West Coast of the US! Join Jacob Wysocki, Jeremy Culhane, Kimia Behpoornia, Kurt Maloney and more for some absurd improv games. Artist presale begins April 23rd on Ticketmaster.com with code “DROPOUT”.

Duration: 00:53

Tags: Dropout Improv, improv, live, laughing, announcements, jacob wysocki, jeremy culhane, kimia behpoornia, kurt maloney
